title: Fix: First successful dictation
summary: Implement distinct visual states for each activation phase (logged out, license pending, subscription inactive, ready) with clear error messaging.
proposed_changes: Implement distinct visual states for each activation phase (logged out, license pending, subscription inactive, ready) with clear error messaging.
validation_plan: Check if users can clearly see their activation status and proceed to dictation without errors.

title: Investigate: paste_execute latency (645ms constant)
summary: paste_execute costs ~645ms constant on every dictation (62% of p50 total). This investigation identifies the root cause at code level before any optimization is proposed. No product code changes allowed.

title: Propose: stuck recording session fix (RC-2)
summary: Recording session started but never stopped causes indefinite chunking sampler loop on ambient audio. Propose Option D: Patch 1 (logging-only, zero blast radius) now; Patch 2 (defensive sampler timeout) deferred until Patch 1 log data is available.
proposed_changes: Promote debug! at transcribe.rs:1170 to warn!
Add session duration + consecutive-empty-chunk tracking in sampler loop
Add warn! after 5 min all-empty and after >20 chunks on sampler exit
validation_plan: cargo check + start recording without stopping + confirm warn! fires after 5 min ambient

patch_sequence.note: Patch 1 can be approved independently — zero behaviour change
Defer until Patch 1 log data confirms drop path and informs MAX_SESSION_DURATION value
